request_text: Documentation is written from the CLI-consumer point of view (as if the reader is the agent running spec-kitty CLI commands), but the real end user works inside a harness (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, etc.) typing slash commands and invoking skills. Segregate docs into a CLI-usage section and a harness-usage (LLM chat) section, and write the harness-usage section for real: how to invoke /spec-kitty.specify, /spec-kitty.plan, /spec-kitty.tasks, /spec-kitty.analyze, skills, and agent profiles from inside Claude/Codex chat, not via raw CLI.
